title: curtia tenella
intro: Curtia tenella, also known as the 'yellow vetchling', is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae. The medicinal properties of Curtia tenella include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Curtia tenella can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
